block.createfood.raw_chocolate_graham_cr: Raw Chocolate Graham Cracker Pie Crust
createfood.configuration.block.tooltip: Register custom blocks via config. Game restart required.
createfood.configuration.category_overri: Pin a named effect category to a specific effect ID, bypassing the default mod-priority order. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.cloth_sack_allo: When enabled, food items are always allowed regardless of the filter list. With no filter this acts as a food-only restriction. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.cloth_sack_eat_: When enabled, right-clicking with the cloth sack in hand eats the first food stored inside instead of opening the inventory. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.cloth_sack_excl: Exclude-list for the cloth sack. Matching items are always blocked even if on the filter list. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.cloth_sack_filt: Allow-list for the cloth sack. If non-empty, only matching items may be inserted. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.cloth_sack_inve: When disabled, the cloth sack has no functional inventory and is purely cosmetic. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.cloth_sack_stac: When enabled, each slot can hold a full stack. When disabled, slots are limited to one item. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.crafting_remain: Add custom crafting remainders to items. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.custom_tooltips: Add custom ingredient & mod compat tooltips for items. Game restart required.
createfood.configuration.disable_items.t: Listed items (and their display blocks) will be hidden and their recipes won't be loaded. Use /reload.
createfood.configuration.display_block.t: Place items from other mods onto display plates. Game restart required.
createfood.configuration.enable_egg_impa: Drop an eggshell when a thrown egg hits a surface. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.enable_filter_i: Toggle cloth filter interactions. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.enable_handcraf: Toggle the creation of two ingredient items via hand. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.enable_pumpkin_: When enabled, using a vanilla pumpkin pie item on a block places a pumpkin_pie_block. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.exclude.tooltip: Block handcrafting of specific items even if they pass the filter. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.filter.tooltip: Filter handcrafting to only produce outputs from the list. If empty, all recipes are allowed. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.filter_interact: Modify filter interactions via inputs/outputs. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.fluid.tooltip: Register custom fluids via config. Game restart required.
createfood.configuration.hide_items.tool: Listed items (and their display blocks) will be hidden and their recipes won't be loaded. Use /reload.
createfood.configuration.item.tooltip: Register custom items via config. Game restart required.
Add, override, or remove effects on items. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.nutrition_satur: Modify the nutrition & saturation modifier on food. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.ration_box_allo: When enabled, food items are always allowed regardless of the filter list. With no filter this acts as a food-only restriction. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.ration_box_eat_: When enabled, right-clicking with the ration box in hand eats the first food stored inside. When disabled, it opens the inventory instead. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.ration_box_excl: Exclude-list for the ration box. Matching items are always blocked even if on the filter list. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.ration_box_filt: Allow-list for the ration box. If non-empty, only matching items may be inserted. Works alongside the food-only setting. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.ration_box_inve: When disabled, the ration box has no functional inventory and cannot be eaten from. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.ration_box_stac: When enabled, each slot can hold a full stack instead of a single item. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.require_shift.t: Display tooltips only when [Shift] is pressed. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.show_compatibil: Display mod compatibility info in tooltips. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.show_ingredient: Display ingredient info in tooltips. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.show_sack_block: Render floating item icons on the front face of placed cloth sack blocks. Takes immediate effect.
createfood.configuration.show_tooltip_ic: Show item icons in the tooltip for cloth sack and ration box items. Takes immediate effect.
